arts.ttl: Herbert Hainer on Bayern Munich’s big game blues
arts.sum: Bayern Munich president Herbert Hainer dismissed critics of Bayern’s big game performance this season. At this point, though, Hainer may have negative results in not big games to worry about too.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Bayern Munich vs. RB Leipzig
arts.sum: The line-ups for Friday's eagerly-awaited Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and RB Leipzig have been announced. Harry Kane returns from injury for Bayern.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Leipzig's Šeško linked to Chelsea
arts.sum: The French giants are looking to sign a right-footed centre-back, as a long-term replacement for the 31-year-old Marquinhos, and the Ukraine international has impressed in the Premier League . - Newcastle United will make a renewed attempt to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford next year, reports the Daily Mail .

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs RB Leipzig: Gamethread and Live Blog — Lineups out, Kane and Davies return!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and RB Leipzig would love to finish the year with a bang, but it feels more like both teams will limp across the finish line. Great news for Bayern, as Harry Kane and Alphonso Davies have recovered ahead of schedule.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies “open” to transfer, Liverpool in the mix
arts.sum: For the better part of the last year, Bayern Munich star left-back Alphonso Davies has been very closely linked to Real Madrid, but those rumors have cooled in recent weeks in favor of whispers that the Canadian would re-up with the Bavarians. Manchester United and Real Madrid could have some competition on their hands in their respective bids to sign Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Firing Loïs Openda loving life at resurgent RB Leipzig
arts.sum: bundesliga.com: Harry Kane is back in training and may make an appearance on Friday; how do you see Bayern and their star striker? bundesliga.com: Would you say Kane is the best striker in the world?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star ‘open to hearing’ offer from Barcelona
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich remains interested in a potential future move to La Liga giants Barcelona. That’s according to German football insider Christian Falk, who has on Friday provided…

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala reveals crucial factors that need consideration before signing Bayern Munich contract extension
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala is basically set for a new and bigger deal at Bayern Munich, which automatically cancels speculation over a move to another club. “For me it’s important that I feel comfortable and can have fun on the pitch, that we are competitive and can compete for the title in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: RB Leipzig outcome could shape perception of Bayern Munich’s first half; Bundesliga predictions; Checking out Stephen Wilson Jr.; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sits in first place of the Bundesliga and is in a good position in the Champions League with two “League Phase” matches left to play. How Bayern Munich eventually replaces those veterans, while also turning over several other rosters spots currently occupied by other established players has some fans uneasy, which has affected the way the might look or feel about how the first half of the season has played out.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs RB Leipzig Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
